mapper.sql: id, user_id, receiver_name, receiver_phone, province, city, district, detail_address, receiver_address, is_default, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mall_shipping_address (user_id, receiver_name, receiver_phone, province, city, district, detail_address, receiver_address, is_default) VALUES (#{userId}, #{receiverName}, #{receiverPhone}, #{province}, #{city}, #{district}, #{detailAddress}, #{receiverAddress}, #{isDefault})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM mall_shipping_address WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_default = 1 LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE mall_shipping_address SET is_default = 0 WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_default = 1
UPDATE mall_shipping_address SET is_default = 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
